signals.headline: ETH ETF Weekly Inflows Hit $275M, Strongest Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Return | YES | HIG
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Weekly Inflows Hit $275M, Strongest Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Return | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with a 7% ETH price climb to nearly $2,400 before settling near $2,288.[1] This marks confirmed institutiona
